revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 箕島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=神社|cat2=高島市}} |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]安曇川町三尾里558 |祭神 = [[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]][http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = 旧村社・式内社(小) |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = 三間社流造 |別名 = 三島明神
三島神社『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''箕島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]、箕島神社（みしまじんじゃ）に比定される[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]。 火災のため記録を喪失しており、創建由緒不明『高島郡誌』141p。ただし、式内社の[[高島郡 (滋賀県)|高島郡]]箕島神社に比定されており、[[延喜式神名帳]]が編纂された[[927年]]以前の創建となる。 主祭神は、箕島が三島（みしま）と同音で、俗に三島明神と呼ばれるため、[[三島・大山祇信仰]]ともされ、[[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]]が充てられる。この他、[[事代主|事代主神]]や[[天神玉命]]とされる場合もある。 == 祭神 == ; 主祭神 * [[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]]（式内社調査報告、滋賀県神社誌、滋賀県神社庁、神社明細帳、高島郡誌に拠る） ;摂社 * 結神社 == 出典 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしまたしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

{{神社 |名称 = 箕島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=神社|cat2=高島市}} |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]安曇川町三尾里558 |祭神 = [[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]][http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = 旧村社・式内社(小) |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = 三間社流造 |別名 = 三島明神

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|箕島神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|箕島神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|箕島神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|箕島神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|箕島神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|箕島神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

revision.comment: 5 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 箕島神社 |画像 = [[File:Minoshima-jinja, Takashima.jpg|270px]]
境内 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]安曇川町三尾里558 |祭神 = [[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]][http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = 旧[[村社]]・[[式内社]](小) |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = 三間社[[流造]] |別名 = 三島明神
三島神社『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=箕島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''箕島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]、箕島神社（みしまじんじゃ）に比定される[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]。 火災のため記録を喪失しており、創建由緒不明『高島郡誌』141p。ただし、式内社の[[高島郡 (滋賀県)|高島郡]]箕島神社に比定されており、[[延喜式神名帳]]が編纂された[[927年]]以前の創建となる。 主祭神は、箕島が三島（みしま）と同音で、俗に三島明神と呼ばれるため、[[三島・大山祇信仰]]ともされ、[[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]]が充てられる。この他、[[事代主|事代主神]]や[[天神玉命]]とされる場合もある。 == 祭神 == ; 主祭神 * [[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]]（式内社調査報告、滋賀県神社誌、滋賀県神社庁、神社明細帳、高島郡誌に拠る） ;摂社 * 結神社 == 出典 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

link|Q134888252}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|箕島神社|version=107291779|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 箕島神社 |画像 = [[File:Minoshima-jinja, Takashima.jpg|270px]]
境内 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]安曇川町三尾里558 |祭神 = [[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]][http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = 旧[[村社]]・[[式内社]](小) |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = 三間社[[流造]] |別名 = 三島明神
三島神社『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=箕島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''箕島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]、箕島神社（みしまじんじゃ）に比定される[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]。 火災のため記録を喪失しており、創建由緒不明『高島郡誌』141p。ただし、式内社の[[高島郡 (滋賀県)|高島郡]]箕島神社に比定されており、[[延喜式神名帳]]が編纂された[[927年]]以前の創建となる。 主祭神は、箕島が三島（みしま）と同音で、俗に三島明神と呼ばれるため、[[三島・大山祇信仰]]ともされ、[[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]]が充てられる。この他、[[事代主|事代主神]]や[[天神玉命]]とされる場合もある。 == 祭神 == ; 主祭神 * [[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]]（式内社調査報告、滋賀県神社誌、滋賀県神社庁、神社明細帳、高島郡誌に拠る） ;摂社 * 結神社 == 出典 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] ==End Japanese==

三島神社『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=箕島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''箕島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]、箕島神社（みしまじんじゃ）に比定される[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]。 火災のため記録を喪失しており、創建由緒不明『高島郡誌』141p。ただし、式内社の[[高島郡 (滋賀県)|高島郡]]箕島神社に比定されており、[[延喜式神名帳]]が編纂された[[927年]]以前の創建となる。 主祭神は、箕島が三島（みしま）と同音で、俗に三島明神と呼ばれるため、[[三島・大山祇信仰]]ともされ、[[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]]が充てられる。この他、[[事代主|事代主神]]や[[天神玉命]]とされる場合もある。 == 祭神 == ; 主祭神 * [[オオヤマツミ|大山積神]]（式内社調査報告、滋賀県神社誌、滋賀県神社庁、神社明細帳、高島郡誌に拠る） ;摂社 * 結神社 == 出典 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

境内 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}安曇川町三尾里558 |祭神 = {{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = 旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}・{{jalink|式内社}}(小) |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = 三間社{{jalink|流造|Q210684}} |別名 = 三島明神
三島神社『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=箕島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''箕島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}、箕島神社（みしまじんじゃ）に比定される[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]。 火災のため記録を喪失しており、創建由緒不明『高島郡誌』141p。ただし、式内社の{{jalink|高島郡 (滋賀県)|Q11669692|高島郡}}箕島神社に比定されており、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}が編纂された{{jalink|927年|Q30470}}以前の創建となる。 主祭神は、箕島が三島（みしま）と同音で、俗に三島明神と呼ばれるため、{{jalink|三島・大山祇信仰|Q127948103}}ともされ、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}が充てられる。この他、{{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主神}}や{{jalink|天神玉命|Q135271288}}とされる場合もある。 === 祭神 === ; 主祭神 * {{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}（式内社調査報告、滋賀県神社誌、滋賀県神社庁、神社明細帳、高島郡誌に拠る） ;摂社 * 結神社 === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

三島神社『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=箕島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''箕島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}、箕島神社（みしまじんじゃ）に比定される[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]。 火災のため記録を喪失しており、創建由緒不明『高島郡誌』141p。ただし、式内社の{{jalink|高島郡 (滋賀県)|Q11669692|高島郡}}箕島神社に比定されており、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}が編纂された{{jalink|927年|Q30470}}以前の創建となる。 主祭神は、箕島が三島（みしま）と同音で、俗に三島明神と呼ばれるため、{{jalink|三島・大山祇信仰|Q127948103}}ともされ、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}が充てられる。この他、{{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主神}}や{{jalink|天神玉命|Q135271288}}とされる場合もある。 === 祭神 === ; 主祭神 * {{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}（式内社調査報告、滋賀県神社誌、滋賀県神社庁、神社明細帳、高島郡誌に拠る） ;摂社 * 結神社 === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:need translation]]

三島神社『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=箕島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''箕島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}、箕島神社（みしまじんじゃ）に比定される[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]。 火災のため記録を喪失しており、創建由緒不明『高島郡誌』141p。ただし、式内社の{{jalink|高島郡 (滋賀県)|Q11669692|高島郡}}箕島神社に比定されており、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}が編纂された{{jalink|927年|Q30470}}以前の創建となる。 主祭神は、箕島が三島（みしま）と同音で、俗に三島明神と呼ばれるため、{{jalink|三島・大山祇信仰|Q127948103}}ともされ、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}が充てられる。この他、{{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主神}}や{{jalink|天神玉命|Q135271288}}とされる場合もある。 === 祭神 === ; 主祭神 * {{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}（式内社調査報告、滋賀県神社誌、滋賀県神社庁、神社明細帳、高島郡誌に拠る） ;摂社 * 結神社 === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]

三島神社『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=箕島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''箕島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}、箕島神社（みしまじんじゃ）に比定される[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]。 火災のため記録を喪失しており、創建由緒不明『高島郡誌』141p。ただし、式内社の{{jalink|高島郡 (滋賀県)|Q11669692|高島郡}}箕島神社に比定されており、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}が編纂された{{jalink|927年|Q30470}}以前の創建となる。 主祭神は、箕島が三島（みしま）と同音で、俗に三島明神と呼ばれるため、{{jalink|三島・大山祇信仰|Q127948103}}ともされ、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}が充てられる。この他、{{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主神}}や{{jalink|天神玉命|Q135271288}}とされる場合もある。 === 祭神 === ; 主祭神 * {{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}（式内社調査報告、滋賀県神社誌、滋賀県神社庁、神社明細帳、高島郡誌に拠る） ;摂社 * 結神社 === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}

境内 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}安曇川町三尾里558 |祭神 = {{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = 旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}・{{jalink|式内社}}(小) |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = 三間社{{jalink|流造|Q210684}} |別名 = 三島明神
三島神社『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=箕島神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''箕島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}、箕島神社（みしまじんじゃ）に比定される[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]。 火災のため記録を喪失しており、創建由緒不明『高島郡誌』141p。ただし、式内社の{{jalink|高島郡 (滋賀県)|Q11669692|高島郡}}箕島神社に比定されており、{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}が編纂された{{jalink|927年|Q30470}}以前の創建となる。 主祭神は、箕島が三島（みしま）と同音で、俗に三島明神と呼ばれるため、{{jalink|三島・大山祇信仰|Q127948103}}ともされ、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}が充てられる。この他、{{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主神}}や{{jalink|天神玉命|Q135271288}}とされる場合もある。 === 祭神 === ; 主祭神 * {{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山積神}}（式内社調査報告、滋賀県神社誌、滋賀県神社庁、神社明細帳、高島郡誌に拠る） ;摂社 * 結神社 === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}

link|Q134888252}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Mishima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Minoshima-jinja, Takashima.jpg|270px]]
Precincts |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Adogawa-chō Miozato 558 |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} / {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (minor) |創建 = unknown |本殿 = three-bay shrine {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = Mishima Myōjin
Mishima Shrine『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Mishima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Mishima Shrine (みしまじんじゃ)[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]. Its records were lost in a fire, so the founding history is unknown『高島郡誌』141p. However, it is identified with Mishima Shrine of {{jalink|Takashima District, Shiga|Q11669692|Takashima District}}, a Shikinaisha, so it must have been founded before {{jalink|927|Q30470}}, when the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} was compiled. Because "Mishima" (written 箕島) is a homophone of "Mishima" (三島), and it is commonly called Mishima Myōjin, it is also regarded as related to {{jalink|Mishima and Ōyama cult|Q127948103}} and assigned {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}. In other cases, the deity is also given as {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Kami}} or {{jalink|Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}

link|Q134888252}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Mishima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Minoshima-jinja, Takashima.jpg|270px]]
Precincts |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Adogawa-chō Miozato 558 |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} / {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (minor) |創建 = unknown |本殿 = three-bay shrine {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = Mishima Myōjin
Mishima Shrine『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Mishima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Mishima Shrine (みしまじんじゃ)[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]. Its records were lost in a fire, so the founding history is unknown『高島郡誌』141p. However, it is identified with Mishima Shrine of {{jalink|Takashima District, Shiga|Q11669692|Takashima District}}, a Shikinaisha, so it must have been founded before {{jalink|927|Q30470}}, when the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} was compiled. Because "Mishima" (written 箕島) is a homophone of "Mishima" (三島), and it is commonly called Mishima Myōjin, it is also regarded as related to {{jalink|Mishima and Ōyama cult|Q127948103}} and assigned {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}. In other cases, the deity is also given as {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Kami}} or {{jalink|Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: used local AI agents to translate these pages. Contrary to the description it was actually Claude Code for a few, OpenClaw with Codex, and regular Codex. Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

link|Q134888252}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Mishima Shrine |画像 = [[File:Minoshima-jinja, Takashima.jpg|270px]]
Precincts |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Adogawa-chō Miozato 558 |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} / {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (minor) |創建 = unknown |本殿 = three-bay shrine {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = Mishima Myōjin
Mishima Shrine『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Mishima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Mishima Shrine (みしまじんじゃ)[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]. Its records were lost in a fire, so the founding history is unknown『高島郡誌』141p. However, it is identified with Mishima Shrine of {{jalink|Takashima District, Shiga|Q11669692|Takashima District}}, a Shikinaisha, so it must have been founded before {{jalink|927|Q30470}}, when the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} was compiled. Because "Mishima" (written 箕島) is a homophone of "Mishima" (三島), and it is commonly called Mishima Myōjin, it is also regarded as related to {{jalink|Mishima and Ōyama cult|Q127948103}} and assigned {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}. In other cases, the deity is also given as {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Kami}} or {{jalink|Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}

Precincts |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Adogawa-chō Miozato 558 |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} / {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (minor) |創建 = unknown |本殿 = three-bay shrine {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = Mishima Myōjin
Mishima Shrine『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Mishima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Mishima Shrine (みしまじんじゃ)[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]. Its records were lost in a fire, so the founding history is unknown『高島郡誌』141p. However, it is identified with Mishima Shrine of {{jalink|Takashima District, Shiga|Q11669692|Takashima District}}, a Shikinaisha, so it must have been founded before {{jalink|927|Q30470}}, when the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} was compiled. Because "Mishima" (written 箕島) is a homophone of "Mishima" (三島), and it is commonly called Mishima Myōjin, it is also regarded as related to {{jalink|Mishima and Ōyama cult|Q127948103}} and assigned {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}. In other cases, the deity is also given as {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Kami}} or {{jalink|Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Mishima Shrine『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Mishima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} Mishima Shrine (みしまじんじゃ)[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]. Its records were lost in a fire, so the founding history is unknown『高島郡誌』141p. However, it is identified with Mishima Shrine of {{ill|lt=Takashima District, Shiga|Q11669692|WD=Q11669692|lt=Takashima District}}, a Shikinaisha, so it must have been founded before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470}}, when the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}} was compiled. Because "Mishima" (written 箕島) is a homophone of "Mishima" (三島), and it is commonly called Mishima Myōjin, it is also regarded as related to {{ill|lt=Mishima and Ōyama cult|Q127948103|WD=Q127948103}} and assigned {{ill|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}. In other cases, the deity is also given as {{ill|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami}} or {{ill|lt=Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288|WD=Q135271288}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{ill|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Mishima Shrine『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Mishima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} Mishima Shrine (みしまじんじゃ)[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]. Its records were lost in a fire, so the founding history is unknown『高島郡誌』141p. However, it is identified with Mishima Shrine of {{ill|lt=Takashima District, Shiga|Q11669692|WD=Q11669692|lt=Takashima District}}, a Shikinaisha, so it must have been founded before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470}}, when the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}} was compiled. Because "Mishima" (written 箕島) is a homophone of "Mishima" (三島), and it is commonly called Mishima Myōjin, it is also regarded as related to {{ill|lt=Mishima and Ōyama cult|Q127948103|WD=Q127948103}} and assigned {{ill|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}}. In other cases, the deity is also given as {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami}} or {{ill|lt=Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288|WD=Q135271288}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{ill|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

In other cases, the deity is also given as {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} or {{ill|lt=Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288|WD=Q135271288|1=Ama no Kantama no Mikoto}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{ill|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami|1=Ōyamatsumi}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Mishima Shrine『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Mishima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Mishima Shrine (みしまじんじゃ)[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]. Its records were lost in a fire, so the founding history is unknown『高島郡誌』141p. However, it is identified with Mishima Shrine of {{ill|lt=Takashima District, Shiga|Q11669692|WD=Q11669692|lt=Takashima District|1=Takashima District, Shiga}}, a Shikinaisha, so it must have been founded before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470|1=927}}, when the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} was compiled. Because "Mishima" (written 箕島) is a homophone of "Mishima" (三島), and it is commonly called Mishima Myōjin, it is also regarded as related to {{ill|lt=Mishima and Ōyama cult|Q127948103|WD=Q127948103|1=Mishima–Ōyamazumi cult}} and assigned {{ill|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami|1=Ōyamatsumi}}. In other cases, the deity is also given as {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} or {{ill|lt=Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288|WD=Q135271288|1=Ama no Kantama no Mikoto}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{ill|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami|1=Ōyamatsumi}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]] {{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)}}[[Category:qq]]

In other cases, the deity is also given as {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} or {{ill|lt=Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288|WD=Q135271288|1=Ama no Kantama no Mikoto}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{ill|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami|1=Ōyamatsumi}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:Mishima–Ōyamazumi cult]] [[Category:qq]]

Precincts |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}} Adogawa-chō Miozato 558 |祭神 = {{ill|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami|1=Ōyamatsumi}}[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1388 箕島神社]（滋賀県神社庁） |社格 = former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (minor) |創建 = unknown |本殿 = three-bay shrine {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = Mishima Myōjin
Mishima Shrine『高島郡誌』98p |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Mishima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Mishima Shrine (みしまじんじゃ)[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/971155/1/243 特選神名牒]. Its records were lost in a fire, so the founding history is unknown『高島郡誌』141p. However, it is identified with Mishima Shrine of {{ill|lt=Takashima District, Shiga|Q11669692|WD=Q11669692|lt=Takashima District|1=Takashima District, Shiga}}, a Shikinaisha, so it must have been founded before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470|1=927}}, when the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} was compiled. Because "Mishima" (written 箕島) is a homophone of "Mishima" (三島), and it is commonly called Mishima Myōjin, it is also regarded as related to {{ill|lt=Mishima and Ōyama cult|Q127948103|WD=Q127948103|1=Mishima–Ōyamazumi cult}} and assigned {{ill|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami|1=Ōyamatsumi}}. In other cases, the deity is also given as {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} or {{ill|lt=Amatsu Kunitama no Mikoto|Q135271288|WD=Q135271288|1=Ama no Kantama no Mikoto}}. === Enshrined deity === ; Principal enshrined deity * {{ill|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|WD=Q386563|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami|1=Ōyamatsumi}} (according to the Shikinaisha investigation report, ''Shiga-ken Jinja-shi'', Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office, shrine registers, and ''Takashima-gunshi'') ; Auxiliary shrine * Musubi Shrine === Sources === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mishima Shrine (Q134888252)]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Takashima, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:Mishima–Ōyamazumi cult]]
